timing: Index volume/amount signal at date t is shifted one trading day before affecting Top100 net returns.
wind_note: WindPy is not available in the current environment, so 868008.WI amount/volume was not tested.
qveris_note: QVeris cn_financial_pro.history_quotation returns 883418.TI history with volume/amount from 2023-07 onward.
sample_note: Available THS microcap volume history starts in 2023-07, so this is a short-window diagnostic, not a 5Y/10Y robustness test.
